one_liner: Neuroscience and rare-disease biotech pivoting from declining MS franchise toward growth products, pipeline milestones, and the Apellis acquisition; proof-first component value ~$145/sh base vs ~$197 price.
key_assumptions: Legacy MS + biosimilar revenue $4.8B at ~34% normalized margin and ~5× duration multiple ($55/sh base).
Rare-disease / growth portfolio $2.2B revenue at ~32% margin and ~12× multiple ($55/sh base).
Aggregate pipeline risked success value $10.6B less $1.8B remaining R&D ($60/sh base).
Apellis assets valued off $689M 2025 revenue with bounded probability and transaction-anchored multiple ($45/sh base).
Post-close senior claims ~$8.0B including CVR and integration judgments (-$55/sh base).
open_questions: First post-close 10-Q purchase-price allocation and CVR liability remeasurement.
Indication-level pipeline probability trees with clinical base rates.
Product-level net cash flows after collaboration shares and rebates.
Deleveraging path after $2B incremental term debt.
